name: Foreplay Public API
description: The Foreplay Public API enables programmatic access to a vast database of advertisements and brands. Search, filter, and analyze ads across platforms including Facebook, Instagram, and Messenger. Manage swipefile collections, boards, and track brands via Spyder subscriptions.
